description: attr_accessor on a non-database virtual attribute — not a convention violation
input:
class Post < ApplicationRecord
  # Virtual attribute: password is not persisted; only password_digest is
  attr_accessor :password

  validates :password, length: { minimum: 8 }, if: :new_record?

  before_save :encrypt_password, if: -> { password.present? }

  private
    def encrypt_password
      self.password_digest = BCrypt::Password.create(password)
    end
end
